interface.shortDescription: Generate beautiful, modern React UI components and search brand logos instantly through natural language using the 21st.dev Magic MCP server.
interface.longDescription: 21st connects agents to current library and framework documentation through the 21st MCP server, reducing stale API answers by resolving library IDs and fetching relevant docs on demand.
defaultPrompt: Generate a React TSX component with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS, including responsive design and proper accessibility attributes.
Create or extend a design system by providing Tailwind CSS tokens, component variants, and usage examples for consistent UI development.
Search for a brand or company logo by name and return it as a ready-to-use JSX, TSX, or SVG component for a React project.
